title: UTC+7

infobox.value: is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +07:00. In [ISO 8601](/wiki/ISO_8601 "ISO 8601"), the associated time would be written as 2026-03-27T07:14:52+07:00. It is seven hours ahead of [UTC](/wiki/UTC "UTC"), meaning that when the time in UTC is midnight (00:00), the time in areas using the time zone would be 07:00.
(**ICT**) and **Western Indonesian Time** ([Indonesian](/wiki/Indonesian_language "Indonesian language"): *Waktu Indonesia Barat*, **WIB**) (in Indonesia), it is used in:

| [Time notation](/wiki/Time_notation "Time notation") | [24-hour clock](/wiki/24-hour_clock "24-hour clock") |
| [tz database](/wiki/Tz_database "Tz database") | Asia/[Jakarta](/wiki/Jakarta "Jakarta") · Asia/[Pontianak](/wiki/Pontianak "Pontianak") · Asia/[Makassar](/wiki/Makassar "Makassar") · Asia/[Jayapura](/wiki/Jayapura "Jayapura") |

**UTC+07:00** is an identifier for a [time offset from UTC](/wiki/UTC_offset "UTC offset") of +07:00. In [ISO 8601](/wiki/ISO_8601 "ISO 8601"), the associated time would be written as 2026-03-27T07:14:52+07:00. It is seven hours ahead of [UTC](/wiki/UTC "UTC"), meaning that when the time in UTC is midnight (00:00), the time in areas using the time zone would be 07:00.

Also known as **Indochina Time** (**ICT**) and **Western Indonesian Time** ([Indonesian](/wiki/Indonesian_language "Indonesian language"): *Waktu Indonesia Barat*, **WIB**) (in Indonesia), it is used in:

## As standard time (year-round)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: As standard time (year-round)")]

Principal cities: [Krasnoyarsk](/wiki/Krasnoyarsk "Krasnoyarsk"), [Novosibirsk](/wiki/Novosibirsk "Novosibirsk"), [Khovd](/wiki/Khovd_(city) "Khovd (city)"), [Hanoi](/wiki/Hanoi "Hanoi"), [Da Nang](/wiki/Da_Nang "Da Nang"), [Ho Chi Minh City](/wiki/Ho_Chi_Minh_City "Ho Chi Minh City"), [Phnom Penh](/wiki/Phnom_Penh "Phnom Penh"), [Vientiane](/wiki/Vientiane "Vientiane"), [Bangkok](/wiki/Bangkok "Bangkok"), [Medan](/wiki/Medan "Medan"), [Palembang](/wiki/Palembang "Palembang"), [Jakarta](/wiki/Jakarta "Jakarta"), [Bandung](/wiki/Bandung "Bandung"), [Semarang](/wiki/Semarang "Semarang"), [Yogyakarta](/wiki/Yogyakarta "Yogyakarta"), [Surabaya](/wiki/Surabaya "Surabaya"), [Pontianak](/wiki/Pontianak "Pontianak"), [Flying Fish Cove](/wiki/Flying_Fish_Cove "Flying Fish Cove").

### East Asia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: East Asia")]

It is considered the westernmost time zone in [East Asia](/wiki/East_Asia "East Asia").

* Mongolia – [Time in Mongolia](/wiki/Time_in_Mongolia "Time in Mongolia")
  + Western part, including [Khovd](/wiki/Khovd_Province "Khovd Province"), [Uvs](/wiki/Uvs_Province "Uvs Province"), [Bayan-Ölgii](/wiki/Bayan-%C3%96lgii_Province "Bayan-Ölgii Province"), [Govi-Altai](/wiki/Govi-Altai_Province "Govi-Altai Province") and [Zavkhan](/wiki/Zavkhan_Province "Zavkhan Province")[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Discrepancies between official UTC+07:00 and geographical UTC+07:00

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Discrepancies between official UTC+07:00 and geographical UTC+07:00")]

Since legal, political, and economic in addition to physical or geographical criteria are used in the drawing of time zones, it follows that official time zones do not precisely adhere to meridian lines. The UTC+07:00 time zone, were it drawn by purely geographical terms, would consist of exactly the area between meridians 97°30′ E and 112°30′ E. As a result, there are places which, despite lying in an area with a "physical" UTC+07:00 time, actually use another time zone. Conversely, there are areas that have adopted UTC+07:00, even though their "physical" time zone is UTC+08:00, UTC+06:00, or even UTC+05:00.

### Areas within UTC+07:00 longitudes using other time zones

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Areas within UTC+07:00 longitudes using other time zones")]

This concerns areas within 97°30′ E to 112°30′ E longitude.

Using [UTC+06:30](/wiki/UTC%2B06:30 "UTC+06:30"):

* Eastern part of Myanmar

Using [UTC+08:00](/wiki/UTC%2B08:00 "UTC+08:00"):

* In China, many parts of central China including these provinces:
  + [Hainan](/wiki/Hainan "Hainan")
  + [Guangxi](/wiki/Guangxi "Guangxi")
  + [Yunnan](/wiki/Yunnan "Yunnan")
  + [Guizhou](/wiki/Guizhou "Guizhou")
  + [Sichuan](/wiki/Sichuan "Sichuan")
  + [Chongqing](/wiki/Chongqing "Chongqing")
  + [Shaanxi](/wiki/Shaanxi "Shaanxi")
  + [Ningxia](/wiki/Ningxia "Ningxia")
  + [Gansu](/wiki/Gansu "Gansu")
  + Western two-thirds of [Hunan](/wiki/Hunan "Hunan")
  + Western half of:
    - [Hubei](/wiki/Hubei "Hubei")
    - [Shanxi](/wiki/Shanxi "Shanxi")
  + [Inner Mongolia](/wiki/Inner_Mongolia "Inner Mongolia"), including its capital [Hohhot](/wiki/Hohhot "Hohhot")
  + Western third of:
    - [Guangdong](/wiki/Guangdong "Guangdong")
    - [Henan](/wiki/Henan "Henan")

* In Russia:
  + [Irkutsk Oblast](/wiki/Irkutsk_Oblast "Irkutsk Oblast")
  + [Buryatia](/wiki/Buryatia "Buryatia")
* Outside China & Russia:
  + Most of central Mongolia including the capital [Ulaanbaatar](/wiki/Ulaanbaatar "Ulaanbaatar")
  + Peninsular [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia")
  + Western part of [Sarawak](/wiki/Sarawak "Sarawak") in [Malaysian Borneo](/wiki/Malaysian_Borneo "Malaysian Borneo") including [Kuching](/wiki/Kuching "Kuching")
  + [Singapore](/wiki/Singapore "Singapore")

Using [UTC+09:00](/wiki/UTC%2B09:00 "UTC+09:00"):

* A (western) part [Sakha Republic](/wiki/Sakha_Republic "Sakha Republic") in Russia, including the urban localities [Aykhal](/wiki/Aykhal "Aykhal") and [Udachny](/wiki/Udachny "Udachny")

### Areas outside UTC+07:00 longitudes using UTC+07:00 time

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Areas outside UTC+07:00 longitudes using UTC+07:00 time")]

#### Areas between 67°30′ E and 97°30′ E ("physical" UTC+05:00 and UTC+06:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Areas between 67°30′ E and 97°30′ E (\"physical\" UTC+05:00 and UTC+06:00)")]

* The westernmost part of Indonesia including most of the province [Aceh](/wiki/Aceh "Aceh") with its capital [Banda Aceh](/wiki/Banda_Aceh "Banda Aceh").
* The westernmost part of Mongolia
* Parts of Russia:
  + A large part of [Krasnoyarsk Krai](/wiki/Krasnoyarsk_Krai "Krasnoyarsk Krai")
  + [Tuva](/wiki/Tuva "Tuva")
  + [Khakassia](/wiki/Khakassia "Khakassia")
  + [Altai Republic](/wiki/Altai_Republic "Altai Republic")
  + [Altai Krai](/wiki/Altai_Krai "Altai Krai")
  + [Kemerovo Oblast](/wiki/Kemerovo_Oblast "Kemerovo Oblast")
  + [Novosibirsk Oblast](/wiki/Novosibirsk_Oblast "Novosibirsk Oblast") (mostly within the "physical" UTC+05:00 area)
  + [Tomsk Oblast](/wiki/Tomsk_Oblast "Tomsk Oblast") (partly within the "physical" UTC+05:00 area)

#### Areas between 112°30′ E and 127°30′ E ("physical" UTC+08:00)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Areas between 112°30′ E and 127°30′ E (\"physical\" UTC+08:00)")]

* In Indonesia:
  + The easternmost part of [Java](/wiki/Java "Java") including [East Java](/wiki/East_Java "East Java")'s capital [Surabaya](/wiki/Surabaya "Surabaya"), [Sidoarjo](/wiki/Sidoarjo "Sidoarjo"), [Malang](/wiki/Malang "Malang"), and [Banyuwangi](/wiki/Banyuwangi_Regency "Banyuwangi Regency").
  + The island of [Bawean](/wiki/Bawean "Bawean") and [Madura](/wiki/Madura "Madura"), and islands of [Kangean](/wiki/Kangean_Islands "Kangean Islands") and [Masalembu](/wiki/Masalembu_Islands "Masalembu Islands"), which administratively belong to [East Java](/wiki/East_Java "East Java") Province.
  + Eastern part of [West Kalimantan](/wiki/West_Kalimantan "West Kalimantan"), and most of [Central Kalimantan](/wiki/Central_Kalimantan "Central Kalimantan"), including the capital [Palangka Raya](/wiki/Palangka_Raya "Palangka Raya")
* In Russia:
  + The very easternmost part of [Krasnoyarsk Krai](/wiki/Krasnoyarsk_Krai "Krasnoyarsk Krai")

## Historical time offsets

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UTC%2B07:00&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Historical time offsets")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1f/ROC-TimeZones.svg/250px-ROC-TimeZones.svg.png)](/wiki/File:ROC-TimeZones.svg)

Kansu-Szechwan (UTC+07:00) is marked green in this map.

The [Republic of China](/wiki/Republic_of_China_(1912-1949) "Republic of China (1912-1949)")'s offset for this time zone was **Kansu-Szechwan**, and was used until 1949, when the [Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party "Chinese Communist Party") took control of [Mainland China](/wiki/Mainland_China "Mainland China") following the [Chinese Civil War](/wiki/Chinese_Civil_War "Chinese Civil War") and made [UTC+08:00](/wiki/UTC%2B08:00 "UTC+08:00") the standard time for all areas under its control. Formerly, from 1918 to 1949, this time offset was used in eastern [Xikang](/wiki/Xikang "Xikang") and [Qinghai](/wiki/Qinghai "Qinghai"), central [Outer Mongolia](/wiki/Occupation_of_Mongolia "Occupation of Mongolia") (1921–1924), and all of [Yunnan](/wiki/Yunnan "Yunnan"), [Guangxi](/wiki/Guangxi "Guangxi"), [Guizhou](/wiki/Guizhou "Guizhou"), [Ningxia](/wiki/Ningxia "Ningxia"), [Suiyuan](/wiki/Suiyuan "Suiyuan"), [Gansu](/wiki/Gansu "Gansu"), [Sichuan](/wiki/Sichuan "Sichuan"), and [Shaanxi](/wiki/Shaanxi "Shaanxi").

This time zone was also the standard time in [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia") and [Singapore](/wiki/Singapore "Singapore") between 1 June 1905 and 31 December 1932.
